1. **Email Template:** `00XQl000005kQavMAE` (AHB_Hormone_Self_Scheduling_Email) contains literal placeholder text "INSERT MERGE FIELD FOR CALENDLY BOOKING" instead of the actual Calendly booking URL
2. **Product2 Record:** No AHB Hormone Consult product exists with Calendly fields populated (`Calendly_Email_Template_Id__c`, `Calendly_Booking_Link__c`, `Calendly_Booking_Form_Name__c`)

**Reference Pattern Found** — Dispatcher flow [Flow: Record_Trigger_After_Save_Send_Genetic_Breakthrough_Schedule_Link](sf://flow/Record_Trigger_After_Save_Send_Genetic_Breakthrough_Schedule_Link) already handles email dispatch. Three existing Clarity Call products (Genetic Breakthrough Session, Precision Wellness, Precision Genetic Test) use this pattern successfully. **No new Flow required.**
**Blocker:** AHB Calendly event booking URL not provided in Jira ticket. Format example: `https://calendly.com/d/33r-dcb-747`

Flows not SOQL-queryable. Retrieve metadata directly.

[Bash] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf project retrieve start --metadata Flow:Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link --target-org 10xhealth --output-dir retrieve_temp 2>&1 | head -50
Found the source! The "schedule appointment" button pulls the link from **Product2.Calendly_Booking_Link__c**. Flow formula at line 123 shows it reads directly from that field:
This confirms the investigation's diagnosis. Link **cannot** be auto-populated or extracted — it must come from the customer's Calendly admin. Updating investigation with this confirmation.

Reading playbook and existing issue files to locate URL for AHB scheduling link workflow.

Reading the investigation, I see the issue is **on-hold waiting for the AHB Calendly booking URL**. Ashlee Edwards said she doesn't know how to access the link that should populate when selecting "schedule appointment" on a consult opportunity.

The investigation identifies that link comes from `Product2.Calendly_Booking_Link__c` field, which is read by the `Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link` flow. Let me hunt down where this URL actually comes from — checking the flow, existing AHB opportunities, and the Calendly configuration.

[Bash] echo "Checking for .env.jira to get Production org access..." if (Test-Path ".env.jira") { Get-Content ".env.jira" | Select-String "CASEOPS_PRODUCTION|MAGIC_LINK" } else { "No .env.jira found" }

Navigating to Flows to find the `Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link` flow and trace the Calendly link.
Let me use sf CLI instead to pull the flow definition directly — faster than scrolling through UI.

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, DeveloperName, Definition FROM FlowDefinition WHERE DeveloperName = 'Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link' LIMIT 1" --org 10xhealth --json | jq '.result.records[0].Definition | fromjson' 2>&1 | head -100

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM FlowDefinition WHERE DeveloperName = 'Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link' LIMIT 1" --org 10xhealth --json

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, DeveloperName FROM FlowDefinition WHERE DeveloperName = 'Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link'" --target-org 10xhealth --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf project retrieve start --metadata "Flow:Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link" --target-org 10xhealth --unzip --output-dir .\temp_retrieve 2>&1 | tail -20

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf project retrieve start --metadata "Flow:Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link" --target-org 10xhealth --target-metadata-dir .\temp_retrieve 2>&1 | tail -30

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps\temp_retrieve" && Expand-Archive -Path "unpackaged.zip" -DestinationPath . -Force && dir flows/ && cat "flows/Screenflow_Opportunity_Appointment_Scheduling_Link.flow-meta.xml" | head -200
Found it! Flow reads the Calendly link from **`Product2.Calendly_Booking_Link__c`** at line 123. Need to check if AHB Hormone Consult product exists and get its URL.

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, Name, Calendly_Booking_Link__c, Calendly_Email_Template_Id__c FROM Product2 WHERE Name LIKE '%AHB%' OR Name LIKE '%Hormone%Consult%'" --target-org 10xhealth --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
Found it! Product **"At-Home Blood Test: Hormone Panel Consultation"** (ID: `01tRh00000DEDVlIAP`) already exists with Calendly link: **`https://calendly.com/d/cw6m-rd6-8rd`**
But it's not linked to email template. Let me verify this is the right product by checking the opportunity from Jira.

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, Name, StageName, RecordTypeId FROM Opportunity WHERE Id = '006Ql00000ebrsjIAA'" --target-org 10xhealth --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Product2Id, Product2.Name, Product2.Calendly_Booking_Link__c, Product2.Calendly_Email_Template_Id__c FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE OpportunityId = '006Ql00000ebrsjIAA'" --target-org 10xhealth --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
**FOUND THE URL!** Product is "At-Home Blood Test: Hormone Panel Consultation" with link: `https://calendly.com/d/cw6m-rd6-8rd`
The issue: Product exists but lacks the email template link. Updating investigation files with exact fix location.

[PowerShell] cd "C:\Users\sean\Projects\Salesforce\DigitalDreams\CaseOps" && sf data query --query "SELECT Id, Name, Calendly_Booking_Link__c, Calendly_Email_Template_Id__c, Calendly_Booking_Form_Name__c FROM Product2 WHERE Id = '01tRh00000DEDVlIAP'" --target-org 10xhealth --json | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10
Perfect! All three Calendly fields exist. Here's the summary:
Product "At-Home Blood Test: Hormone Panel Consultation" (ID: `01tRh00000DEDVlIAP`) has:
1. **Email Template** (`00XQl000005kQavMAE`): Replace placeholder "INSERT MERGE FIELD FOR CALENDLY BOOKING" with:

Once these are done, the dispatcher flow automatically fires on new AHB opportunities and sends email with the scheduling link. Updated investigation and internal notes with exact artifacts and fix details.
